Notice And Motion To Compel Pltfs' Responses To Form Interrogatories And Production Of Documents; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-28-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Alamo Rent a Car LLC's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiffs are ordered to serve verified responses within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $600 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
